response.justification: While Bogdan possesses exceptional technical depth across all required areas (TypeScript, full-stack development, clean architecture), he is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role. As a current Staff Engineer with 20 years of industry experience and multiple senior positions, there are substantial concerns about role fit, retention likelihood, compensation expectations, and geographic requirements (currently in São Paulo with high on-site presence needed). This candidate would be far better suited to a senior or principal engineer position.
strengths: Mastery of TypeScript and full-stack development across multiple companies and complex domains
Deep expertise in clean code practices, TDD, and software craftsmanship with proven ability to lead technical initiatives
Current role working on AI-agent infrastructure demonstrates cutting-edge technical capabilities and continued growth mindset
concerns: Significant overqualification for junior/mid-level role raises serious retention and compensation fit concerns
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience mentioned despite these being stated job requirements
Geographic location (São Paulo, Brazil) conflicts with job's high on-site presence requirement
